title: prestonia morilloi
intro: Prestonia morilloi, also known as "Prestonia," is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections. Prestonia morilloi is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can also be found in herbal preparations such as tinctures and capsules.
